revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{When}} begin-->{{Fix | link = Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Dates and numbers#Chronological items | text = as of? | title = {{{reason|The time period mentioned near this tag is ambiguous.}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = [[Category:All articles with vague or ambiguous time]] | cat-date = Category:Vague or ambiguous time }}<!--{{As of?}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{When}} begin-->{{Fix | link = Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Dates and numbers#Chronological items | text = as of? | title = {{{reason|The time period mentioned near this tag is ambiguous.}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Vague or ambiguous time }}<!--{{As of?}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:All articles with vague or ambiguous time]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:All articles with vague or ambiguous time]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=As_of%3F here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=As_of%3F for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{When}} begin-->{{Fix | link = Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Dates and numbers#Chronological items | text = as of? | title = {{{reason|The time period mentioned near this tag is ambiguous.}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Vague or ambiguous time }}<!--{{As of?}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:All articles with vague or ambiguous time]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
